linkedin.connection_note: Hi! I specialize in creating websites for bakery businesses in Budapest. I'd love to connect and share some ideas for Kovács Pékség.
linkedin.follow_up: Thanks for connecting! I noticed Kovács Pékség doesn't have a website yet. I prepared a free preview of a modern site design for your business. Want me to send it over? No strings attached.

whatsapp.message_hu:
Szia! 👋

Weboldal készítő vagyok, és Budapest-i bakery vállalkozásoknak segítek modern weboldalakkal több ügyfelet szerezni.

Készítettem egy ingyenes előnézetet a Kovács Pékség számára - érdekli?

Kötelezettségmentes, 15 perces Google Meet konzultáció - válaszoljon és küldöm a meghívót!
whatsapp.message_en:
Hi! 👋

I create modern websites for bakery businesses in Budapest.

I prepared a free website preview for Kovács Pékség - interested?

No-obligation 15min Google Meet consultation - just reply and I'll send the invite!

instagram.message:
Hi Kovács Pékség team! 🙌

Love what you're doing in Budapest! I create modern websites for local businesses and I think an upgraded online presence could really help grow your bakery business.

I actually made a free preview of what your new site could look like. Want to see it?

No commitment, just thought you'd appreciate it! 😊
